/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror CMakeFiles/app.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Meeting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Participation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Room.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/MeetingPlanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/XMLreader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Campus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Building.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Renovation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinyxml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinyxmlparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinyxmlerror.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/tinyxml_2_6_2/tinystr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/Catering.cpp.o -o app
